metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5238
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: immunogold EM of mouse cerebellum and hippocampus showed SG2NA (STRN3) was localized to dendritic spines without any particles localized to the PSD. No presynaptic localization was observed.

Figure 2: confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for SG2NA, MAP2, Phalloidin and synaptotagmin in cultured hippocampal neurons showed SG2NA localized to dendrites and postsynaptic puncta. Stainings for SG2NA were apposed to presynaptic marker synaptotagmin.. Experimental description: Results, Figure 1 legend: "Electron microscopic immunogold staining of SG2NA in mouse cerebellum and hippocampus"

To confirm the protein sequence used for plasmids and confirm SG2NA as an alias for gene STRN3; "This mouse SG2NAb sequence has been deposited in the GenBank data library under accession no. AF307777." --> GenBank AAG24454 --> uniprot sp|Q9ERG2|STRN3_MOUSE.

antibody:
"Antibodies raised against striatin family proteins have been described previously and were used at 2-4 mg/mL for immunofluorescence or 1 mg/mL for immunogold labeling (10)." PMID:10748158
